results.n: knowledge credential is signed + content-addressed (re-derives, Law L5)
only DIGESTS are published (raw claims never on the credential)
social graph opened: signed, content-addressed, EMPTY
discloses ONLY the chosen claim (name); the rest leak nothing
multi-claim disclosure reveals exactly the chosen set
fabricated claim refused (digest not in the signed set)
tampered credential refused (a flipped digest breaks κ)
bilateral edge requires BOTH signatures + re-derives (Law L5)
a one-sided edge is NOT a real edge
a tampered edge (changed kind) is refused
enrol runs the ceremony silently (knowledge + graph attached)
